name: 贡献与意义
description: 用于表达论文对文献、方法、经验证据、政策和理论理解的推进

clusters.meaning: 本文的贡献在于/推进了X文献

expressions.note: 最通用，适合概括论文所属文献贡献
expressions.example: This study contributes to the literature on social mobility.

expressions.note: 强调推进争论，而不只是增加一个案例
expressions.example: The findings advance debates about credential inflation.

expressions.note: 语气更宽，适合连接多个相关文献
expressions.example: The results speak to scholarship on gender and work.

expressions.en: add to a growing literature on
expressions.note: 适合新兴领域，强调与正在扩展的研究对话
expressions.example: We add to a growing literature on platform labor.

expressions.note: 直接标记方法贡献，适合清楚说明创新点
expressions.example: We make a methodological contribution by linking survey and tax data.

expressions.note: 适合变量或指数创新，贡献点具体
expressions.example: We introduce a new measure of employment volatility.

expressions.en: offer a new way to capture
expressions.note: 比 introduce 更柔和，强调测量视角
expressions.example: We offer a new way to capture household instability.

expressions.note: 强调数据条件带来的方法优势，而非模型本身
expressions.example: We leverage newly available data on monthly earnings.

clusters.meaning: 本文提供了新的经验证据

expressions.note: 最标准，适合明确经验贡献对象
expressions.example: We provide new empirical evidence on debt and marriage.

expressions.note: 强调过去没有被观察到的模式，贡献感更强
expressions.example: We document previously unobserved patterns of return migration.

expressions.note: 简洁有力，适合直接陈述核心发现
expressions.example: We show that wealth gaps widen before college entry.

expressions.en: bring evidence from X to bear on Y
expressions.note: 强调用特定数据或背景回应更大问题
expressions.example: We bring evidence from China to bear on debates about aging.

expressions.en: have implications for policy debates about
expressions.note: 通用政策意义表达，不直接提出政策建议
expressions.example: The findings have implications for policy debates about childcare.

expressions.note: 强调研究可为实践提供信息，语气务实
expressions.example: The results inform efforts to reduce educational inequality.

expressions.note: 语气较强，适合指出政策缺口或行动需求
expressions.example: The evidence points to the need for targeted support.

expressions.note: 强调某政策维度重要，适合讨论段收束
expressions.example: The findings underscore the importance of affordable housing.

expressions.note: 适合表达概念或现象理解被拓展
expressions.example: The analysis broadens our understanding of family inequality.

expressions.note: 强调解释框架更全面，而不只是结果更多
expressions.example: We offer a broader account of educational stratification.

expressions.note: 更理论化，适合讨论概念边界
expressions.example: The paper expands the conceptual scope of precarity.

expressions.note: 强调重新理解某概念，创新感更强
expressions.example: We recast migration as a family-level strategy.

expressions.note: 比 the first 更谨慎，避免过度声称唯一性
expressions.example: This study is among the first to examine gig work and fertility.

expressions.en: to our knowledge, the first study to
expressions.note: 需要谨慎使用，适合确有检索把握时
expressions.example: To our knowledge, this is the first study to link these records.

expressions.note: 更有修辞感，适合强调开创新方向
expressions.example: The paper breaks new ground by measuring within-year instability.

expressions.note: 强调初步探索，适合新政策或新数据
expressions.example: We provide an initial assessment of the reform's distributional effects.

clusters.meaning: 本文桥接了A和B两个文献

expressions.note: 标准表达，强调连接两个研究传统
expressions.example: We bridge two strands of literature on migration and family change.

expressions.en: bring together research on A and B
expressions.note: 更自然，适合跨领域但不强调整合理论
expressions.example: We bring together research on education and health inequality.

expressions.en: connect insights from A to debates about B
expressions.note: 强调用一个领域的洞见回应另一个领域的问题
expressions.example: We connect insights from demography to debates about labor markets.

expressions.en: situate X at the intersection of A and B
expressions.note: 强调研究对象位于两个文献交叉处，理论定位强
expressions.example: We situate caregiving at the intersection of gender and migration.
